text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Did you know? The Earth as we know it now 
is the result of countless coincidences.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Its mass, size, distance from the sun, 
the blessing of water resulting from a 
collision with other planetary bodies… 
I think you get the picture.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Put another way, you could say that progress 
demands a certain degree of spontaneity.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Which is why you — yes, you shall be the subject of my next experiment! Coincidence brought you before me, and I shall act accordingly!
